description: Style NoteLove laid-back Italian style? Now all you need is a pair of white linen pants and these sandals from arrow. Lounging by the poolside, vacationing at a beach resort or simply chilling at a sushi joint, this pair from Arrow is the right footstyle choice simply because it's sleek and stylish without the bulk of usual men's sandals. Product DetailsBlack sandal with forefoot and midfoot straps with bucklesHas an ankle loop with a Velcro closureSoft footbed with perforations, stitched detailing and branding on the heelOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with diagonal and circular grooves and a pivot point on the forefoot Material and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
